playbook.intent: Engineer a documented funnel that turns a 1K-subscriber free newsletter into ~200 paying customers at $20 average through low-friction email-driven conversion, hitting $4K MRR.
playbook.scope: Engineer a documented funnel that turns a 1K-subscriber free newsletter into ~200 paying customers at $20 average through low-friction email-driven conversion, hitting $4K MRR.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Map the funnel
stage.intent: See subscribe -> open -> click -> buy as one chart.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only with a single named leak.

stage.name: Sharpen positioning
stage.intent: Re-write the paid offer for the subscriber base.

tasks.task: Re-write the offer headline for the niche
Match price to the audiences WTP

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when one angle outperforms by >=25%.

stage.name: In-issue ad format library
stage.intent: Build repeatable ad placements inside the newsletter.

tasks.task: Design 3 in-issue ad formats (banner, native, p.s.)
Slot them into the next 4 issues

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when at least one format hits CTR target.

stage.name: Onboarding email sequence
stage.intent: Convert new subscribers in the first 14 days.

tasks.task: Track open + click + buy per email

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when sequence converts >=5% of new subs in 14 days.

stage.name: Live launch issue
stage.intent: Run a focused conversion push to the whole list.

tasks.task: Build a launch issue with a single CTA

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when launch issue produces measurable revenue spike.

stage.name: Churn-save email pack
stage.intent: Stop new customers from bouncing in month 1.

tasks.task: Wire churn-trigger emails (no usage, payment fail, downgrade)

stage.name: Pricing experiments
stage.intent: Test packaging on the engaged segment.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when test produces net positive revenue lift.

stage.name: Weekly cadence + dashboards
stage.intent: Lock weekly reads so the funnel keeps moving.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when dashboard runs for 4 consecutive weeks.

stage.name: Hit the 200-customer mark
stage.intent: Close the loop with the OKR.
stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when OKR is met OR retro names the next move.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content newsletter-paid-product-funnel-convert-1k-free-readers-into-200-customers --format md, agent: faion get-content newsletter-paid-product-funnel-convert-1k-free-readers-into-200-customers --format context, json: faion get-content newsletter-paid-product-funnel-convert-1k-free-readers-into-200-customers --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
